chunking_policy.artifact_metadata: Chunk boundaries follow small metadata file summaries rather than raw table dumps.
chunking_policy.length_guard: WP5 keeps chunks structure-aware and compact; no embedding-oriented token chunking is performed.
chunking_policy.markdown_documents: Chunk boundaries follow markdown heading sections instead of raw token windows.
chunking_policy.registry_entries: Chunk boundaries follow individual truth, drift, phase, glossary, and source entry boundaries.

stable_id_strategy: Deterministic ids derived from registry ids, source ids, normalized paths, and structural section names.
